data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for Instagram bio link integration.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the specific need for Instagram bio link integration. However, the provided evidence does not include any checks or confirmations regarding the existence or functionality of this integration. The linked use case mentions the need for this integration, but there is no direct evidence supporting that it has been satisfied.
gaps: No evidence confirming the existence or functionality of the Instagram bio link integration.
